phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tomb of Saint Martin is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le tombeau de saint Martin ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh tom-BOH duh san mar-TAN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint Martin was a 4th-century Roman soldier who became bishop of Tours and is a patron saint of France. His tomb in the crypt is a major pilgrimage destination.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tomb of Saint Martin is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le tombeau de Saint Martin ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh tohm-BOH duh SAHN mar-TAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The tomb of Saint Martin is located in the crypt of the basilica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the basilica is on the Camino de Santiago route
phrases.text_local: Cette basilique est-elle sur le chemin de Saint-Jacques-de-Compostelle ?
phrases.pronunciation: set bah-ZEEK ay-TEL soor luh shuh-MAN duh san-ZHAK duh kom-poh-STEL
phrases.cultural_note: Tours is the starting point of the Via Turonensis, one of the four main French routes of the Camino de Santiago. Pilgrims traditionally begin their journey at Saint Martin's tomb.

responses.english: Yes, it is a stop on the route.
responses.phonetic: wee say toon ay-TAP doo shuh-MAHN
responses.french: Oui, c'est une étape du chemin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the two surviving medieval towers are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les deux tours médiévales qui ont survécu ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay DUH TOOR may-dee-ay-VAL kee on soor-vay-KOO
phrases.cultural_note: The Tour Charlemagne and the Tour de l'Horloge are the only surviving remnants of the original medieval basilica, visible in the surrounding streets.

responses.english: The Charlemagne Tower is right next to it.
responses.phonetic: lah TOOR shar-luh-MAH-nyuh eh ZHOOST ah koh-TAY
responses.french: La Tour Charlemagne est juste à côté.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about opening times for the crypt
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires d'ouverture de la crypte ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay oh-RAIR doo-vair-TOOR duh lah KRIPT
phrases.cultural_note: The crypt containing Saint Martin's sarcophagus is the most visited part of the basilica and has its own entrance and visiting hours.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay zoh-RAIR sohn tah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.
